items.title: Drift faces backlash over plan to convert exploit-linked assets into USDT
items.whyYouShouldCare: Drift's plan to convert exploit-linked assets into USDT could affect user trust and liquidity, impacting overall market confidence in the platform.

items.title: Coinbase adds Solana-backed loans through Morpho, letting users borrow up to $100,000
items.whyYouShouldCare: Coinbase's addition of Solana-backed loans enhances liquidity options for users, potentially increasing Solana's ecosystem usage and attracting more participants.

items.title: Roaring Kitty-linked RKC memecoin crashes as developer cashes out $729K
items.whyYouShouldCare: The crash of the RKC memecoin following a developer cash-out highlights risks in speculative assets, which could influence investor sentiment towards similar projects.
